description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service. Include a before_script that logs into registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then logs into Docker Hub with username gbraad and $DOCKER_PASSWORD. Define four jobs—build_alpine, build_centos, build_fedora, and build_ubuntu—each restricted to the master branch. In each job run: docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/openstack-client:<distro> ./<distro>, docker push registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/openstack-client:<distro>, docker tag registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/openstack-client:<distro> gbraad/openstack-client:<distro>, and docker push gbraad/openstack-client:<distro>. No caches, artifacts, or additional stages are defined.
